channel.title: Tweaks & Hacks on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tweaks & Hacks on yexca'Blog

item.title: Remove Potplayer Bottom-Right Pop-ups
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Intro Potplayer is an excellent video player. However, recent versions have started showing annoying pop-up ads in the bottom-right corner. This article covers two methods to get rid of them. Use an Older Version Without Pop-ups (Recommended) The last version without ad pop-ups is 1.7.18958. All old PotPlayer versions can be downloaded from: PotPlayer Old Versions Downloads Direct download for version 1.7.18958: 64-bit | …
